idea-plugin.name: En-Ru File Finder
idea-plugin.description: Switch between 'en' and 'ru' folders for the same file. Works with single or multiple file selection, preserves caret position and scroll offset.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Version 1.4

  • Multiple file selection – now you can select several files in the Project tool window (Shift+click or Ctrl+click) and the plugin will open all their counterparts from the opposite language folder.
  • Folder detection – plugin now ignores folders; if you select a folder, it will show a clear message instead of trying to process it.
  • Caret position sync – if the original file is already open in the editor, the plugin remembers the cursor line and moves the caret to the same line in the opened counterpart file.
  • Clearer feedback – improved notification messages: you'll see how many files were opened, and any errors (e.g., missing counterpart) are listed separately.
  • Bug fixes – fixed NPE when processing files in project root, and other edge cases.

Version 1.3

  • Initial release: switch between en/ru files with Ctrl+Alt+\

action.description: Switch between en and ru folders
